calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Continued To Jun-01-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Plaintiff Chi Hung Lee telephone number 408-915-8110 in Propria Persona.
Mara Curtis of Reed Smith LLP telephone number 213-457-8216 appeared by telephone for Defendant GrubHub.

Ms. Curtis informed the Court that service was made on Plaintiff's former Counsel. Mr. Lee stated that he read the demurrer on line. The Court was also informed of a simular action pending in Los Angeles and Federal Court. The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT GRUBHUB, INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. If the Court recieves a judgment that dismisses the case it will be without prejudice. Mr. Lee can file a new case if there is no other case covering the same claim. Ms. Curtis is to prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
